task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access the tax documents and scenario details
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or document viewer is open showing files in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\.
The name 'Margaret Chen' is visible in the personal information section or taxpayer profile within StudioTax.

task_completion.description: Enter OAS and CPP/QPP pension income
task_completion.visual_evidence: T4A(OAS) slip showing $8,560 and T4A(P) slip showing $14,200 are filled out in the StudioTax interface.
T4RIF slip showing $52,000, T5 slip showing $2,340, and entries for T3 and T5008 are visible in the StudioTax forms.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the application title bar confirms the file is named 'margaret_chen.24t' and is being saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: Agent used the StudioTax 2024 GUI to complete the return
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the StudioTax graphical interface (clicking buttons, filling form fields) rather than using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent did not create the .24t file using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The .24t file is generated via the StudioTax 'Save' functionality, not by writing XML/text directly in Notepad, VS Code, or via echo commands.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered the data into the tax software
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive data entry into the tax slips and forms, rather than just loading a pre-completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Margaret Chen. Expected Income Amounts: T4A(OAS) = $8,560; T4A(P) = $14,200; T4RIF = $52,000; T5 = $2,340. The return must include T3 Trust income and T5008 Schedule 3 dispositions. Output file must be named 'margaret_chen.24t' and saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.
